blended.narrative: Pats Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,116 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 46°F.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
